memory.title: What the AI remembers

mirror.policySubtitle: Please read and confirm the following principles.
mirror.policyExplainWhat: StrategAIze conducts a structural analysis that examines the company from different perspectives. Your view from day-to-day operations is particularly valuable.
mirror.policyExplainHow: You answer questions about your area of work — freely, in your own words. There are no right or wrong answers. It's about your honest assessment.
mirror.policyExplainResult: The results flow into an aggregated and depersonalised overall analysis. Your answers will not be passed on as individual opinions.
mirror.policyExplainAI: An AI assistant guides you through the questions and helps with any clarifications.
mirror.policyIntro: As part of the exit-readiness analysis, StrategAIze conducts a structural reality assessment. Your participation is confidential and serves exclusively for organisational positioning.
mirror.policyPoint1: Your answers will not be shared with management on a personal basis.
mirror.policyPoint2: The evaluation is aggregated and depersonalised — patterns and structures are analysed, not individual opinions.
mirror.policyPoint3: This is not an employee evaluation and will not be used for employment law or disciplinary purposes.
mirror.policyPoint4: The goal is better transparency and organisational clarity as a basis for strategic decisions.
mirror.policyClosing: By confirming, you agree to these principles.
mirror.confidentialityBanner: Your answers are treated confidentially and will not be shared on a personal basis.
mirror.dashboardSubtitle: Confidential assessment — your answers are only visible to StrategAIze
mirror.profileSubtitle: To better support you during the conversation, please provide a few brief details.
mirror.profileIntroductionPlaceholder: Tell us briefly about yourself and your role in the company.

nominations.title: Suggest Mirror Participants
nominations.subtitle: Suggest employees for the confidential reality assessment. StrategAIze handles the invitation.
nominations.empty: No participants suggested yet. Click "Add participant".

learning.title: Learning Center

mirror.howToAnswerText: Answer the questions freely in your own words. There are no right or wrong answers. Describe your daily work as concretely as possible — with examples, situations, and processes.
mirror.aiAssistantText: An AI assistant guides you through the questions. It asks follow-up questions when something is unclear or when more details would help. You can also ask it directly if you don't understand a question.
mirror.confidentialityText: Your answers are treated confidentially and will not be shared with management on a personal basis. The evaluation is aggregated and depersonalised.

learning.guideNotReady: The user guide is being prepared.

sop.title: Standard Operating Procedure
sop.generateHint: Generates a structured action plan from the Knowledge Units

diagnosis.generateHint: Generates a structured diagnosis per subtopic from the Knowledge Units

diagnosis.sopGateHint: Please confirm the diagnosis before generating SOPs.

modeSelector.title: How would you like to work?
modeSelector.questionnaireDescription: Answer each question individually. The AI asks follow-up questions and helps with formulation.
modeSelector.freeformDescription: Talk freely about your company. The AI will map your statements to the questions afterwards.

overview.title: Topic Overview
overview.subtitle: These topics will be covered in the conversation:

chat.endChatConfirmText: The AI will map your statements to the questions and create neutralized drafts. You can then review and accept the drafts.
chat.welcome: Welcome! Tell me freely about your company — strengths, challenges, processes, whatever seems important to you. I will ask follow-up questions as needed.

softLimit.title: Enough material collected
softLimit.description: You have already shared a lot of valuable information. We recommend evaluating the results now.

mapping.loadingDescription: The AI is mapping your statements to the questions and creating neutralized drafts.
mapping.error: Evaluation failed. You can try again.

review.title: Review Results
review.subtitle: The AI has identified the following mappings. Select the drafts you would like to accept.
review.supplement: Supplement — existing answer will be updated
review.noMappings: No mappings found. The conversation did not contain concrete answers to the questions. You can start a new conversation or answer the questions individually.
review.unmappedDescription: These questions were not addressed in the conversation.

meetingGuide.goalPlaceholder: What should be achieved in this conversation?
